## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Changes that affect scoring, criteria, or tiers are covered by an accepted RFC
- [ ] I have added my sign-off (`Signed-off-by: Name <email>`) or used `git commit -s`
- [ ] If this adds a new criterion, I have included: ID, tier, weight, question, scoring rubric, and evidence guidance
